title: Lights4fun Set of 3 TruGlow® Pillar Candles Battery LED Flameless with Timer Real Red Wax
features: Warm and flickering white light that illuminates the flame, for an extremely realistic effect
description: Product Description This candle set is ready to impress you! Made of real wax, they may look like boring electric candles but once lit, you will be speechless. The LED will illuminate the flame of a warm flickering light and, as if by magic, the candles will be indistinguishable from the traditional. Thanks to the dark red colour, these candles are the perfect decoration for Christmas! They will create a cosy atmosphere wherever you want to place them! And there will be no risk of leaving them on unsupervised - no open flames, no melted wax and the LED inside won't get hot, making them safe for use near the most delicate materials. Powered by batteries and built-in timer With only 2 AA batteries per candle, you can enjoy up to 600 hours of continuous lighting which results in more than 3 months when used with timer mode. Once the mode is selected, the candles will remain lit for 6 hours, then light up day after day, at the same time. TruGlow Set of 3 Ivory Wax LED Candles with Realistic Flame TruGlow Set of 3 Ivory Wax LED Pillar Candles TruGlow White Wax Battery LED Candle with Wick and Realistic Flame TruGlow Set of 3 White Wax LED Candles with Bronze Ombré Effect TruGlow Set of 4 White Wax LED Votive Candles with Realistic Flame TruGlow Set of 3 White Wax LED Candles with Silver Ombré Effect Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,869 4.1 out of 5 stars 162 4.7 out of 5 stars 496 4.3 out of 5 stars 398 3.9 out of 5 stars 650 4.3 out of 5 stars 398 Price £24.99 £ 24 . 99 — no data £9.00 £ 9 . 00 £27.99 £ 27 . 99 — no data £14.99 £ 14 . 99 Height: 10, 12.5 and 15 cm 10, 12.5 and 15 cm 10 cm 10, 12.5 and 15 cm 5.5 cm 10, 12.5 and 15 cm 6 Hour Timer ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Fleece 6 x AA 6 x AA 2 x AA 6 x AA 4 x CR2032 (included) 6 x AA
